title: Bricks to Clay Bricks
description: Changes the names of the 'Bricks' items to 'Clay Bricks'!
body:
### This simple pack changes the names of the 'Bricks' items to 'Clay Bricks'

It always bothered me that the original 'Bricks' kept that name even when some dozen different brick types were added, so I made a pack that changed that!

### It impacts the following items:
- Bricks - to Clay Bricks
- Brick - to Clay Brick
- Brick Stairs - to Clay Brick Stairs
- Brick Wall - to Clay Brick Wall
- Brick Slab - to Clay Brick Slab

Currently the pack is only compatible with the English (US) language
